# Norbert Br3tt - Personal Website & Blog

> Norbert Br3tt is a creative developer, designer, and AI enthusiast. This website serves as a portfolio of his projects and a blog sharing insights on web development and AI.

This file provides AI agents with context about the structure and purpose of the website, helping them navigate and understand the available content.

## Navigation

- [Home](https://br3tt.vercel.app/): The main landing page showcasing projects and latest insights
- [Blog](https://br3tt.vercel.app/articles): A collection of articles on Vibe Coding, AI, and SvelteKit best practices
- [About](https://br3tt.vercel.app/about): Background information and professional experience
- [Contact](https://br3tt.vercel.app/contact): Reach out for collaboration or inquiries
